einmalzahlung.label: One-time Payment
einmalzahlung.description: 100% of the project price · no monthly payment · cheapest option

hybrid.label: Hybrid Model
hybrid.description: Deposit · remainder in installments · flexible term

monatlich12.label: Monthly, 12 Months
monatlich12.description: €0 deposit · full price + surcharge over 12 months

monatlich24.label: Monthly, 24 Months
monatlich24.description: €0 deposit · full price + surcharge over 24 months

title: Price Offer – {{projectName}}
editIntro: Set the one-time payment project price and adjust the other three payment options if needed. All four will be released together.
declinedAllText: The customer has declined all four price options.
draftNotSetText: The project price has not yet been set by the owner.
releasedWaitingText: Price options have been sent to Kreavolut – response pending.
manualResponseIntro: Record response manually (e.g. after a phone call)
releaseConfirmMessage: This will send all four payment options by email to Kreavolut (info@kreavolut.de) for selection.
chooseConfirmMessage: Do you really want to record the option "{{label}}" as accepted?
declineAllConfirmMessage: Records that the customer has not accepted any of the four price options.
releaseError: Price could not be released. Please save a project price first.
declineAllRecordedSuccess: All price options recorded as declined.
